Metadata.title: Target Master
Metadata.description: Track targets and performance across your shops.

Dashboard.title: Main Dashboard
Dashboard.repRankingsDescription: Rankings based on an equal share of shop targets.

DetailedDashboard.title: Shop Dashboard
DetailedDashboard.forecastAsOf: Forecast based on data available as of {date}.
DetailedDashboard.forecastUnavailable: Forecast unavailable until at least two days of current-month data are available.
DetailedDashboard.individualPerformance: Individual monthly performance based on an equal share of targets.
DetailedDashboard.noData: No data available for this shop.
DetailedDashboard.managerBonusDescription: {group} based on a base bonus of {base}
DetailedDashboard.managerBonusMissingCollection: Import or enter the shop's monthly collection to calculate the manager bonus.
DetailedDashboard.managerBonusNote: Categories below 80% receive no bonus. Achievement is capped at 120%; payout is based on the completed whole percentage point.
DetailedDashboard.shopBonusIneligible: Shop share excluded: individual performance is below 50%
DetailedDashboard.bonusNavigationDescription: Calculated from the imported results for {month}
DetailedDashboard.bonusMonthDescription: Bonus calculations for {month}, based on the latest imported shop results.

Dialogs.setTargetsDescription: Define your goals for each performance metric.
Dialogs.editAchievementsDescription: Manually set the total achieved for each metric for the month.
Dialogs.manageShopsDescription: Add, edit, or remove your shop locations and their sales representatives.
Dialogs.shopDescriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of the shop.
Dialogs.newShopDescriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of the new shop.
Dialogs.deleteConfirmationDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the shop and all of its associated data.
